<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">

<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <title>2026 New Year Fireworks | CodeTap</title>
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="./style.css">
  <link rel="apple-touch-icon" href="https://codetap.org/assets/img/favicon.png">
  <link rel="icon" type="image/png" href="https://codetap.org/assets/img/favicon.png">

</head>

<body>
  <script>
    window.canvasOptions = {
      //- autoClear: true,
      autoCompensate: false,
      autoPushPop: true,
      canvas: true,
      //- centered: true,
      desynchronized: false,
      width: null,
      height: null,
      drawAndStop: false
    };
    /* requestAnimationFrame */
  </script>
  <script src='https://codepen.io/Alca/pen/XeZBab.js'></script>
  <script src='https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/simplex-noise/2.4.0/simplex-noise.min.js'></script>
  <script src="./script.js"></script>

</body>

</html>
